Setlist
Tour:SummaryShowsSongsGuestsLiberationsMedia
Dave Matthews & John Mayer (FireAid)
Kia Forum     Inglewood, CA
 
Thursday
 
This concert is taking place at two different venues simultaneously, the other being the Intuit Dome. Also playing at the Kia Forum are Alanis Morissette, Anderson .Paak, Dawes, Graham Nash, Green Day, John Fogerty, Joni Mitchell, No Doubt, P!nk, Red Hot Chili Peppers, Stephen Stills, Stevie Nicks, and the Black Crowes (performance order TBA).

On January 29, it was announced that Dave would not perform due to a critical illness in the family, which turned out to be his mother, who died on February 9.
This show was cancelled
